text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober's debut race goes without a hitch,
and now it's time to decide our next goal. There
are two paths racers like her usually take.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's the Classic Triple Crown tour, which
consists of the Satsuki Sho, Japanese Derby, and
Kikuka Sho...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And there's the Triple Tiara tour, which consists
of the Oka Sho, Japanese Oaks, and Shuka Sho.
choice_data_list: (I should ask Dober which path she prefers.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While I'm pondering such thoughts, two shadows
race beneath the night sky elsewhere...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Ngh... Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I did it! Looks like I crossed the finish line
first.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, you were incredible! I didn't stand a
chance.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Why, thank you! ♪ It seems all my hard work is
starting to pay off.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Speaking of, Bright, I heard you changed your
training regimen recently.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Ryan said you're pushing yourself even harder
than before. She couldn't decide whether to be
worried about you or happy about your growth.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Well! ♪ Hehe! That does sound like Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Still, I'm not the only one who's different. You've
changed since your debut race too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh? Have I?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: My, don't tell me you haven't noticed?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I've been watching you for a long, looong time,
so I can tell that the look in your eyes has
changed, Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: In fact... As you are now, I bet...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Hm? You bet what, Bright?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Teehee. Dober, would you happen to have some
free time after this?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Ah, what a stunning view. You can see for miles
out from here.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Why did you bring me up here?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Look, Dober. I think the Mejiro estate
should be thereabouts in that direction.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I still remember the days you and I spent there
together...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Remember how we snuck into the library as
children? You held my hand and led me around
the whole time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Well, yeah... I didn't want to get caught, and you
were determined to leisurely stroll through the
entire place.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for always looking out for me, dear
Dober! ♪ We saw so many things in the library,
didn't we?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
All along the shelves were countless
awards—proof of the remarkable history the
Mejiros forged themselves.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
McQueen, Ryan, Palmer... All of our predecessors
have carried on the Mejiro legacy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
They refined and improved the legacy they
inherited, and through their efforts, the Mejiro
name remains a bright pinnacle in the racing
world.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: And now, it is our turn.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Are we to forever remain the "baby Mejiros,"
shielded by the glories of the past, and allowed
only to fawn over famed legacies?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I should think not.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Bright...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Dober. I will follow after you and make my own
dazzling debut into the racing world...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
After which, I will follow the path of the Classic
Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I shall be the one to claim the glory that even
Ryan let slip through her fingers. I shall claim the
Triple Crown for the Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: And then, I will forge a new Mejiro legacy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: A... a new legacy...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: That's right. As for you, Dober...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: What will you do?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(I always thought I would simply stay in the
shadows.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(People like Bright, Ryan, and McQueen can run
toward their glory with strength alone... They're
different from me.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (Or at least, that's what I thought...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I ran with all my strength! In an actual race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(I was able to finish that race because of
everyone's support. It gave me the confidence to
believe I'm a capable racer too.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(So long as I still have that pride within me, then
surely I, too...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'm going to do the same.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'll forge a new legacy too!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to race in the Triple Tiara tour and
conquer the Oka Sho, Japanese Oaks, and Shuka
Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to do what Ramonu—the Mejiro family's
pride and joy and the first person to win the
Triple Tiara—did and seize all three tiaras too!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Bright.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm not letting you blaze a path by yourself. Let's
make history together.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Let's forge new legacies for the Mejiro family!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Teehee. I knew it. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I had a feeling you would say that, Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Wait, were you testing me?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Why, of course not!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I simply wanted to hear you say how you felt in
your own words.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Sigh... You and your mind games...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Now then...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Take my hand, Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Okay.

text_block_list.name: Dober and Bright
text_block_list.text:
We're going to win the Triple Crown and Triple
Tiara! We're going to forge new legacies for the
Mejiro family—together!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Their promise echoes toward the setting sun...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That night, Mejiro Dober comes to tell me about
her goals and plans.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And she tells me how she and Mejiro Bright want
to build new Mejiro legacies.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, we decide to set her on the path
toward the Triple Tiara.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I want to continue the legacy Ramonu left
behind...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I know I'm nowhere near qualified to say such a
thing. I'm still lacking in so many ways.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: But—
choice_data_list:
That just means we need to work hard to
change that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
choice_data_list:
I'll do everything I can to help you become even
stronger!

I'll do everything I can to help you become even
stronger!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: "Even" stronger? Geez...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Trainer... You're so...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Well, if I want to compete in the Triple Tiara tour
during my classic year, I should race in the
Hanshin Juvenile Fillies first.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Well, if I want to compete in the Triple Tiara tour
during my classic year, I should race in the
Hanshin Juvenile Fillies first.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'll make sure to leave my mark at that race first,
then focus on improving for the real show—the
Triple Tiara tour!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our next goal is the Hanshin J.F., followed by the
Triple Tiara.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober has taken her first bold steps as a
member of the prestigious Mejiro family!
